name: YOUR HOCKEY RIVAL 🍠 Arturo Guerrero
description:
Too much alcohol and trash talk, and you hate-fucked your rival. He thinks gay men are disgusting, but every time he fucks a chick, he imagines you whimpering when he stroked your cock.

Again, my baby Maebaebae made the magazine cover for me. She's so good at this that I can't help asking her ehe.

Situation: He's on the Mustangs. You're on the Eagles. Rivals on the ice. Then you fucked. Now you're seeing each other again in a bar.
It's simple, so go wild. But know this: there isn't a single player in the NHL who's publicly gay. Almost the whole league is homophobic and sexist. And I don't know if anyone will ask, but please don't ask for FemPOV or AnyPOV. I mean it. Arturo can't be written into any other POV. The story just won't work, he will feel flat, I swear.

CREATOR'S NOTE

WARNING! LONG NONSENSE YAPPING AHEAD. PLS ROLL PASS IT IF YOU JUST WANNA GOON, CAUSE THE SHIT BELOW ISN'T REALLY RELATED TO THE BOT!

Hockey connoisseurs, pls don't roast me. This is my first time writing a hockey bot. All this time I've only used one hockey bot actually, and I loved him. So I've been wanting to make a hockey bot for quite a while. I was thinking the role of user to be a reporter, fan, lover... but couldn't decide.

Then I accidentally stumbled into Heated Rivalry. I haven't read it, only got interested. Lmao how I found out about it is kinda funny too. You guys know that trend where a group of friends show their belongings and people guess who's the odd one out? That post was "guess who's gay" and one of the clues was a copy of Heated Rivalry.

Then I thought... I used to be very into reading BL. Chinese and Japanese BL specifically. Why not make an MLM? I mean, AnyPOV is what I like to do the most so everyone can use my bots, and I mainly use female sonas... BUT FUCK TODAY I WANT TO FIGHT WITH A TOXIC MAN. I WANT TO FIGHT LIKE TWO FUCKING MEN.

I really like to brawl with male bots in RP for no reason. But when I use my female sona, male bots won't hit back (as they should), and I also don't want to beat up a female bot when I'm using a female sona. So this one is pretty much self-indulgent, but also like... what the fuck is wrong with me, lmao.
Honestly I'm just kinda burned out with heavy stuff lately, so I wanna do something lighter.

P.S. Okay, the music mania song — at first I chose "Te Conocí," but then I heard "Luz Roja" out of nowhere and found it more fitting. "Te Conocí" feels more nostalgic and calmer than this bot, idk. Lmao I feel like I'm listening to too much phonk now. I can even sing them now lol. I'll be speaking Spanish in no time.

P.P.S. I'm sorry, I'm so sorry, I need to say this: please spare me, cause I literally have no hockey culture. Like none. Because I live in a tropical country. (When I was younger, I thought to myself, "Ice hockey really is a famous sport? How many countries even play it? I've literally never seen it." Then I realized colder countries have many, many sports that I didn't know... I USED TO THINK WINTER OLYMPICS = PLAYING SPORTS BUT IN WINTER, OKAY?)

My assignment to write this bot was basically "go read 20+ hockey bots now." Haha, the first time I actually looked into a hockey game, I texte
creator: Polangto
